job_result.summary: Found 3 news articles for query "Bertrandt AUTOSAR safety engineer".

articles.title: Bertrandt AG Expands AUTOSAR Software Team Amid Safety Push
articles.snippet: Bertrandt AG has announced a significant hiring push in its AUTOSAR and functional safety division, targeting ISO 26262 ASIL-D expertise across Munich and Stuttgart.

articles.title: EDAG Group Wins Chassis Safety Validation Contract for Tier 1
articles.snippet: EDAG Group secured a multi-year chassis validation program with a major German Tier 1 supplier, focused on ISO 26262 compliance and automated FMEA tooling integration.

articles.title: Continental Doubles Down on Autonomous Safety Architecture Hiring
articles.snippet: Continental AG is targeting 200 additional safety architecture engineers for its ADAS unit, with a focus on AUTOSAR Adaptive, SOTIF, and cybersecurity per UN R155.
